summary: Well-structured test suite covering all main policies (MaxAgeDays, KeepLatestPerWorkflow, MaxTotalSizeBytes) and core functions. Fixtures are well-designed with New-MockArtifact helper and deterministic reference dates. Good organization with Describe/Context/It blocks. Gaps: boundary conditions not thoroughly tested (artifacts exactly at age cutoff, single artifact exceeding total size budget, KeepLatest=0 or exceeding artifact count), tie-breaking with same creation dates not covered, limited error scenarios (no malformed JSON tests), output formatting assertions use loose wildcards instead of exact matching. Would catch most regressions but misses important edge cases and unusual policy interactions.
